programme.desc: Secret Agents James West and Artemus Gordon attempt to stem a tide of counterfeit currency.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West and Artemus Gordon must stop a gargantuan cannon that has turned one town into dust and is now aimed at Denver.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon help a frightened sheriff defend his town against an attack by an army of cutthroats.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon try to stop a territorial governor who runs his domain with dictatorial power.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A villainous art collector masterminds a plot to turn agent James West against the Secret Service.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon battle an assortment of characters to extradite a Bosnian Nobleman back to his homeland to face trial.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Custom foam forms and the "cat face" plaster technique replicate existing detail in the house. Norm visits cabinetmaker Larry Buckland. The existing roof on the main house will have to be replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Alfonso shows Kevin the last two steps of the stucco system. We see the house’s new period-appropriate ornamental ironwork. The reproduction tile for our project is hand-glazed and goes up inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1930s floors are matched with red oak and walnut. The new back terrace, with corbels and tile, is constructed. We see attractive low water plants. Kevin gets a close look at the Hollywood sign.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kitchen cabinets, soapstone countertops, an archway, and a coved ceiling are installed. Richard helps with a pedestal sink. The Juliette balcony and decorative iron balustrade are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new custom garage door blends with the period of the house. The front gates are installed. Kevin shows the front yard, hardware, and light fixtures, then visits a spectacular Spanish style house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work on the Los Angeles project wraps up with the finishing touches both outside and in. We reveal the space and landscaping. The family congratulates everyone on a job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: TOH TV heads to Bedford, MA, to check out their new project: a colonial-era home. The Homeowners plan to preserve the historic part of the house while adding space and amenities with two additions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transplants shrubs and plants from the front. Kevin and Norm remove the front entry porch and clapboards. Tom shows the layout for the new addition. Roger sets up a drain and sump pump system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Mark open up a hole in the old fieldstone foundation. Historic sashes are taken off for rehab. Richard sees the oldest flag in the country. Tom forms the new addition’s foundation out of ICFs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds the walls of the entry addition framed up. Tom creates the connection to the main house. Mark repairs the chimney and the kitchen fireplace gets removed. Norm revisits the Acton Project.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn Nawada shows the landscape plan. Roger removes invasive vines and brambles. Tom raises a new gable wall. Kevin repairs a historic window sill. Norm and Kevin demo the ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin explains the benefits of using OSB sheathing. Tom removes a cast iron pipe obstructing structural beams. Norm sees our historic window sash repaired. Tom takes down the old wall of the ell.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom adds insulation to the oldest part of the house. Roger gets a lesson in building a cook's garden. Jenn and Roger build raised beds out of old fieldstone. Tom waterproofs the new roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a rotted post. Restored historic window sashes are installed. The garage's electrical service is upgraded. Kevin shows the kitchen's inspiration. Tom removes reveals historic boards.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs new red cedar clapboards. Richard helps remove some old kitchen plumbing. Roger installs a new asphalt driveway. Richard shows how he's solving a rough plumbing problem.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom create a historically accurate front door. The ailing American Beech tree gets saved. Kevin shows an antique home. Interior designers share the direction for the new space.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a granite front step and spreads ryegrass on the lawn. Tom installs new wood windows. Norm visits the Colonel James Barrett house. Richard seals and insulates the old ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Norm install decorative timbers. Richard shows A/C condensers' concrete mounting pad. Norm visits the Parson Capen House in MA. Tom uses a new hidden deck fastening system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger creates a winding brick path. Fitting a modern kitchen into an old house. Richard shows a zero-clearance gas fireplace. Norm makes wainscoting out of old boards. White oak floorboards go down.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom restores the c. 1720 front door and makes "barn" doors for the pantry. Richard shows a new zone damper system. Mark installs a hearth using reclaimed bricks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger lays the driveway finish. Custom wall coverings and ironwork are installed. Tom shows the new garage door. Richard shows the latest water heaters. We see family room and kitchen lighting plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger and Jenn install plant material. Backsplash tile, wallpaper, and metalwork are installed. We see the finished kitchen and design choices. The wrap party begins.

programme.title: This Old House

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Shane Mosley
programme.desc: On November 10th. 2007 Miguel Cotto fought Shane Mosley at Madison Square Garden in New York City for the WBA World welterweight title in a full 12 round bout that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Mike Tyson vs Lorenzo Canady
programme.desc: On August 15th, 1985 Mike Tyson and Lorenzo Canady fought eachother at Resorts International in Atlantic City that resulted in Tyson defeating Canady in the first round by Knockout.

programme.title: Efe Ajagba vs Brian Howard
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021 Efe Ajagba faced Brian Howard at the Osage Casino in Tulsa, Ok. With the fight ending by knockout in the third round securing the win for Ajagba.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Joe Frazier 3
programme.desc: On October 1st, 1975, Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier fought for the third time for the World Heavyweight Title. Known as the "Thrilla in Manila," Ali ultimately emerged as the victor in what is considered one of the greatest boxing matches of all time.

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Lenny Zappavigna
programme.desc: On June 30th, 2018 Alex Saucedo fought Lenny Zappavigna for the vacant WBO International Super lightweight title.

programme.title: Donald Curry vs Milton McCrory
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1985, Donald Curry fought Milton McCrory for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Welterweight Titles in Las Vegas. Putting on the pressure early, Donald Curry came out firing, knocking out McCrory in the second round.

programme.title: Jeff Harding vs Dennis Andries
programme.desc: On June 24th, 1989, Jeff Harding fought Dennis Andries for the WBC Light Heavyweight Title in Atlantic City. In an incredible back-and-forth fight with both fighters landing huge power shots, Harding surprisingly stopped Andries in the final round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Best of Janibek
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of Janibek "Qazaq Style" Alimkhanuly.

programme.title: Sean O'Grady vs Hilmer Kenty
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1981 Sean O'Grady battled Hilmer Kenty for the WBA World Lightweight title at Ballys Park Place Hotel Casino in Atlantic City the 15 round bout ended in a unannimous decision win for O'Grady.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Dillian Whyte
programme.desc: On April 23rd, 2022 Tyson Fury fought Dillian Whyte for the WBC World Heavyweight title at Wembley Stadium Whyte suffered injuries throughout the fight causing the fight to end by technical knockout in the 4th round giving the bout to Fury.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Tom Schwarz
programme.desc: On June 15th, 2019 Tyson Fury went up against Tom Schwarz for the WBO Intercontinental Heavyweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted two rounds ending by technical knockout securing Fury's win.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Trios Tournament officially kicks off as Team Spirit and Team IQ Superior both look to pick up the first win and advance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The next Tag Team Championship Match is on everybody's minds as The Tonga Twins set up a Fatal Four Way Main Event to determine their next challenger. The Trios Tournament continues as Stephy Slays and The Mighty Mights face a fractured Team Exile.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: There's no stopping Americana as she challenges Jessie Jones to a one-on-one contest in The Main Event, despite concerns from Santana Garrett. The Brat Pack is joined by an intriguing third member as they enter the first round of the Trios Tournament.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Last Call demands a championship match against The Tonga Twins. Las Bandidas and Tormenta hope that Latin Power can stand tall in their first trios tournament match against The Mighty Mights and Keta Rush.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Princess Aussie's singles match against WOW World Champion Abilene Maverick as the Australian tries to prove that she'll never give up chasing her dream.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Coach Campanelli addresses the fallout from last week's Trios Tournament Match, and Team Spirit's path forward as the tournament continues with Tormenta and Las Bandidas facing Team Exile in the next semi final match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four are incensed to find out that because of their constant attacks on The Mother Truckers, David McLane has granted Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag a Main Event tag team match against Penelope Pink and Vickie Lynn McCoy.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal have a new look, but it's make or break for The All American Girls as they call their shot against them for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The VIP Abilene Maverick is firmly in The Beast's crosshairs as The Beast finally gets the rematch she's been waiting on for weeks, and a chance to reclaim the WOW World Championship that she never lost.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast demands justice after taking a loss in the WOW World Championship Match in the last episode of WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Following the astonishing events of the Trios Tournament Finals last week, Coach Campanelli's newly formed Top Tier Team with herself, Kandi Krush and Gloria Glitter make their intentions crystal clear to the WOW roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: To prove that the members of Team Spirit are more than just benchwarmers, Ariel Sky challenges Top Tier to face Team Spirit head on in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the truth about Abilene Maverick's injury is revealed, David McLane reminds her of her obligation to defend The WOW World Championship Title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abilene Maverick makes a special announcement that shakes the WOW roster to its core before The Beast wrestles "Best In Show" breed competition champion, Goldie Collins.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh escorts an East Coast photographer to take a picture of his friend El Gato (The Cat), who is a famous, hilarious bandit living in the hills of Mexico with a small army.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A broke Josh is hired by a fearful man to help him elope with his sweetheart, Jane, the daughter of a local rancher.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh takes a job for $200 protecting an express office employee who stole $10,000 and wants to return it before it's discovered missing.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A Japanese woman travels to the U.S. to find an American man who proposed to her in Japan and hires Josh to find him since no one will help her in her search.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in town thinking the sheriff summoned him to go after a man.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides to Barney Durant's horse business to rent a couple of horses right after Barney pushes his son David to leave.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: While pursuing Carl Martin, Josh stops at a marshal's office where Carl is being held.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When phony wanted posters put a price on the head of a retired Confederate officer, Colonel Sykes' daughter summons Josh Randall to help keep the bounty hunters at bay.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A reclusive old man with an Apache bodyguard is wanted for a crime committed long ago.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A ranch manager hires Randall to bring back a line rider charged with grand theft.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked into advancing half the bounty to a man who promises to lead him to the wanted criminal Shawnee Bill, but Bill may be closer than Randall thinks.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A banker with a consuming thirst for vengeance hires Randall to accompany him to track down the man he believes responsible for his son's death and a bank robbery.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is deputized to transport a ruthless killer to Tucson but exchanges him for the nun kidnapped by the killer's gang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall brings a suspected murderer to Pot Hole but fears the man won't receive a fair trial when he finds the townspeople in the grip of a power-mad bully.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Josh, as a favor to a friend, escorts a beautiful woman to a trial that could see her hang for killing her husband, her lover, and a foreman, she charms him to convince her of her innocenences.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is asked by Stacy Torrance for help when she finds a wanted poster under her door - for her for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Owing a favor to a sheriff, Josh agrees against better judgment to go to the lawless town of Bent Horn to bring back a man wanted for bank robbery and murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh sets out to help a heartbroken wife locate her missing husband, but his mission of mercy meets with a resistant and tight-lipped townspeople.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?
